title: Stop AI From Clicking the Wrong Button — 6-Layer Target Safety Net
desc: L1: ambiguous pattern matches multiple windows → list + hwnd auto-heal. L2: modal alert blocking → auto-find buttons inside. L3: FOCUSED/LEAF terminal node → suggest grab target. L4: Win32 child not found → list siblings (MFC/HTS). L5: no #scope on element action → root children + focus chain. L6: UIA scope element miss → list available elements.
author: claude
